title: Bump to v4.0.0-RC1
body: This is the first RC of v4.0.0. Release notes will be published for a subsequent release, once Netavark is ready for testing.

comments.body: Uh... Did the bot forget who our approvers are?

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** Approval requirements bypassed by manually added approval. This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
